# Phase 7: Document Management — Context

**Gathered:** 2026-04-09
**Status:** Ready for planning
**Mode:** Auto-generated (autonomous smart discuss)

<domain>
## Phase Boundary

Build the document browsing, inline viewing, and PDF export system. Squad outputs from
Phase 5 are already stored in `squad_jobs.output` and `squad_jobs.structured_output` —
this phase adds organized navigation, inline viewing, run history, and PDF export.

**In scope:**
- Outputs page per client: hierarchical browse by phase → process → run
- Inline document viewer (structured output rendered, raw output in pre block)
- Run history per process (all completed squad_jobs, not just latest)
- PDF export of structured outputs using @react-pdf/renderer
- Download raw CLI output as .txt file
- Link from process row to its output history

**Out of scope:**
- Supabase Storage file uploads (squad outputs are in DB, not files)
- Client-facing portal (operator shares PDFs manually)
- Batch export (one document at a time for v1)
- Template customization for PDF exports (v2)
- Feedback loop data surfacing (Phase 9)

</domain>

<decisions>
## Implementation Decisions

### Outputs Page

- **D-01:** New route: `/clients/[id]/outputs` — shows all squad outputs organized by
  phase → process hierarchy. Accessible from client profile via "View Outputs" link.

- **D-02:** Page structure: accordion by phase (1-5), within each phase show processes
  with completed runs. Each process row shows: process name, squad name, run count,
  latest run date. Click expands to show run history.

- **D-03:** Run history: list all `squad_jobs` WHERE `client_id = ?` AND `process_id = ?`
  AND `status = 'completed'`, ordered by `created_at DESC`. Each row shows:
  date, duration (if available), structured/raw badge, "View" button.

### Inline Document Viewer

- **D-04:** "View" button opens a full-width panel (not modal) showing:
  - Structured output rendered as formatted content (if `structured_output` exists)
  - Tabs: "Structured" | "Raw" (raw shows `output` field in scrollable pre block)
  - Metadata: process name, squad, date, duration

- **D-05:** Structured output rendering reuses `StructuredOutputView` from Phase 5
  (`src/components/squad/StructuredOutputView.tsx`). Phase 7 just embeds it in the
  outputs page context.

### PDF Export

- **D-06:** "Export PDF" button on each completed run. Uses `@react-pdf/renderer` to
  generate a branded PDF with:
  - Header: Agency OS logo placeholder + client name + date
  - Section: Process name + phase name
  - Body: Structured output content (or raw text if no structured output)
  - Footer: "Generated by Agency OS"

- **D-07:** PDF generation happens client-side using `@react-pdf/renderer`'s
  `<PDFDownloadLink>` component. No server-side PDF rendering needed.

- **D-08:** PDF template lives in `src/components/documents/OutputPdfTemplate.tsx`.
  Single template for all process types — renders the structured output JSON
  as labeled sections.

### Raw Output Download

- **D-09:** "Download Raw" button creates a .txt file download of the raw CLI output.
  Uses client-side Blob + URL.createObjectURL. File named:
  `{client-name}_{process-name}_{date}.txt`

### Navigation Integration

- **D-10:** Client profile page (`/clients/[id]`) gets a "View All Outputs" link
  that navigates to `/clients/[id]/outputs`.

- **D-11:** Dashboard header nav gets "Clientes" link (already added) — outputs are
  accessed through client profile, no separate top-level nav entry needed.

### Claude's Discretion

- Exact PDF styling (fonts, colors, spacing)
- Whether run history uses pagination or infinite scroll
- Accordion vs flat list for phase grouping
- Whether to show empty phases (no completed runs)

</decisions>

<canonical_refs>
## Canonical References

### Phase 5 Outputs
- `src/components/squad/StructuredOutputView.tsx` — Reuse for inline document viewing
- `src/lib/squads/schemas/index.ts` — Schema types for structured output
- `src/app/(dashboard)/clients/[id]/page.tsx` — Client profile page to add outputs link

### Database
- `supabase/migrations/00001_initial_schema.sql` — squad_jobs table (output, structured_output columns)

### Tech Stack
- `@react-pdf/renderer` — Listed in CLAUDE.md recommended stack for PDF generation

</canonical_refs>

<code_context>
## Existing Code Insights

### Reusable Assets
- `StructuredOutputView` component — already renders structured vs raw output
- `squad_jobs` table — already stores output + structured_output + metadata
- Process definitions in `src/lib/pipeline/processes.ts` — process names for display
- Client profile page pattern — accordion, data fetching, component composition

### New Files Needed
- `src/app/(dashboard)/clients/[id]/outputs/page.tsx` — Outputs page
- `src/components/documents/OutputPdfTemplate.tsx` — PDF template
- `src/components/documents/OutputViewer.tsx` — Full inline viewer panel
- `src/components/documents/RunHistoryList.tsx` — Per-process run list

</code_context>

<specifics>
## Specific Ideas

- @react-pdf/renderer needs to be installed (listed in CLAUDE.md but may not be in package.json)
- PDF generation is client-side only — no headless browser or server-side rendering
- Run history gives operators visibility into the full execution timeline per process
- Raw .txt download is a safety net — operator can always access unprocessed CLI output

</specifics>

<deferred>
## Deferred Ideas

- Batch export all outputs for a client — v1.1
- PDF template customization (logos, branding per client) — v2
- Supabase Storage for large file attachments — v2
- Output comparison view (diff between runs) — v2
- Search across all outputs — v2

</deferred>
